meta.name: DESCRIPTION
meta.value: Update stickers and warning messages if have changes

header.para: 附有警告文字的警告标签

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 随便进入机门或者误开机床，有造成人员死伤的危险。

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 进入机门内时，务必切断机床的电源。

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 装卸加工件时注意力不集中，容易造成因加工件脱落而夹伤，或被加工过的部分割伤等事故。

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 因此装卸工件时务必慎重。

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:13px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在插进刀套前，请确保刀具夹在原点位置。

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.15; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
